conclusion.theorem: Any finite EML tree has finitely many zeros (real-analytic by Hadamard factorization).
conclusion.pumping_lemma: EML-k tree has at most 2^k zeros. Observed max is 0-1, far below bound.
conclusion.tight_conjecture: Tight bound is O(k) or even O(1) for monotone families. 2^k is the loose analytic bound from repeated Rolle's theorem application.
conclusion.barrier_corollary: sin has inf zeros on R -> sin cannot be any EML-k tree for finite k.
